title: hepetis pruinosa
intro: Hepetis pruinosa, also known as Prickly Poppy or White Prickly Poppy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the poppy family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Hepetis pruinosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
